data.body: NOTE (path update 2026-04-23): In SC5 the cited line `plugins/dso/skills/create-bug/SKILL.md:122` shifted to line 51 after a token-efficiency refactor of the skill (162 → 79 lines). The `[0-9a-f]{4}-[0-9a-f]{4}` regex is unchanged; only the line number moved. Migration target still applies.
